name: Cloud Security Policy
description: Board-approved cloud security policy covering scope, objectives, roles and responsibilities, approved cloud services, data residency requirements, shared responsibility obligations, and review schedule. Serves as the governance foundation for all cloud security activities.

name: IAM Policy Matrix
description: Matrix mapping cloud IAM roles to permissions per service, environment, and data classification. Includes custom role definitions, permission boundaries, and justification for each role assignment. Used for access reviews and onboarding.

name: MFA Enrollment and Compliance Report
description: Report showing MFA enrollment status for all cloud identities. Includes MFA method type (virtual, hardware, FIDO2), enrollment date, last usage, and compliance status against policy requirements.

name: Cloud Encryption Standard
description: Technical standard defining encryption requirements per data classification: algorithms, key lengths, key management approach (provider-managed, CMK, HSM, BYOK), TLS minimum versions, and cipher suite requirements.

name: Data Classification Register
description: Register of all cloud data stores with assigned classification level, owner, encryption method, access controls, retention requirements, and geographic restrictions. Includes automated discovery scan results and manual classifications.

name: Cloud Network Architecture Diagram
description: Comprehensive network diagram showing all VPCs/VNets, subnets, peering connections, transit gateways, private endpoints, load balancers, WAF, and internet-facing resources. Includes security group summary and data flow annotations.

name: Security Group and Firewall Rule Register
description: Register of all security groups, NSGs, and firewall rules with business justification, owner, creation date, last review date, and expiry date for temporary rules. Used for quarterly rule review and audit evidence.

name: Cloud Incident Response Playbook
description: Collection of cloud-specific IR playbooks covering: credential compromise, data exposure (public bucket/blob), cryptomining, ransomware, supply chain compromise, and insider threat. Each playbook includes detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and notification steps.
format: PDF/DOCX or SOAR workflow definitions -- version controlled
frequency: Annual review, updated after each incident

name: Disaster Recovery Test Report
description: Report documenting DR test execution: scenario, scope, timeline, actual vs target RTO/RPO, issues encountered, and remediation actions. Includes sign-off from business owner confirming recovery met requirements.
format: PDF report -- signed off by business owner and IT

name: Backup Coverage and Compliance Report
description: Report showing backup coverage across all cloud resources: resources backed up vs total, backup frequency vs RPO target, last successful backup, encryption status, and immutability status. Highlights gaps in backup coverage.

name: Cloud Vulnerability Scan Report
description: Report from CSPM and vulnerability scanning tools showing: resource misconfigurations, software vulnerabilities, compliance violations. Includes severity distribution, remediation status, and trend analysis.

name: Cloud Penetration Test Report
description: Report from cloud-focused penetration testing covering: IAM privilege escalation, network segmentation bypass, data exposure, container breakout, and serverless abuse. Includes finding severity, proof of concept, and remediation guidance.

name: Cloud Configuration Baseline
description: Documented security configuration baseline per cloud service type (compute, storage, database, networking, IAM). Based on CIS Benchmarks with organisation-specific additions. Implemented as policy-as-code for automated enforcement.
frequency: Updated on CIS Benchmark release, reviewed annually

name: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) Repository
description: Central repository of SBOMs for all production applications and container images. SBOMs in SPDX or CycloneDX format with build provenance metadata. Used for rapid CVE-to-deployment correlation when new vulnerabilities are disclosed.
format: SPDX/CycloneDX JSON -- stored in artifact repository

name: CI/CD Pipeline Security Configuration
description: Documentation of CI/CD pipeline security controls: authentication method (OIDC federation), secret management integration, branch protection rules, required reviewers, scanning gate configuration, and artifact signing setup.
format: Pipeline-as-code in version control + architecture document

name: Cloud Access Review Report
description: Report documenting quarterly access review of privileged cloud roles: current role holders, justification for access, any changes made (revoked, downgraded), and sign-off from approving manager.

name: KMS Key Inventory and Lifecycle Register
description: Inventory of all KMS keys with: key ID, purpose, owner, creation date, rotation status, rotation period, associated resources, access policy summary, and deletion protection status.

name: Container Image Vulnerability Scan Report
description: Report showing vulnerability scan results for all container images in registries and running in production. Includes severity distribution, remediation SLA compliance, base image currency, and images blocked from deployment.
frequency: Weekly for production, on every build in CI/CD

name: CIS Benchmark Compliance Report
description: Report from CIS Benchmark assessment showing compliance percentage by section, list of non-compliant findings with severity, remediation status, and exception register with risk acceptance for items that cannot be remediated.

name: CSP Compliance Reports Collection
description: Collection of current CSP compliance reports: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001 certificate, CSA STAR attestation, and shared responsibility model documentation. Reviewed annually to confirm CSP maintains compliance.
format: PDF reports from CSP compliance portals

name: Cloud Landing Zone Configuration
description: Documentation and IaC templates for the cloud landing zone: account structure, organisational units, SCPs/policies, network topology, logging configuration, security service enablement, and guardrails. Serves as the repeatable foundation for all new cloud accounts.
owner: Cloud Platform Team / Cloud Security Architect

name: RTO/RPO Register
description: Register of Recovery Time Objective and Recovery Point Objective for all cloud workloads, tiered by business criticality. Includes business impact analysis justification, backup frequency alignment, and last validated test result.
format: Spreadsheet with linked DR test reports
frequency: Annual review, updated on architecture change

name: Cloud Threat Detection Findings Report
description: Report showing cloud-native threat detection findings (GuardDuty/Defender/SCC) over the reporting period: finding types, severity distribution, investigation outcomes, false positive rate, and mean time to investigate.

name: Cloud Vendor Security Assessment Records
description: Security assessment records for cloud and SaaS vendors: CAIQ responses, SOC report review notes, shared responsibility documentation, data processing agreements, and annual reassessment records.
format: Assessment forms + review notes per vendor

name: DLP Policy and Findings Report
description: Report showing DLP policy configuration, detection findings, blocked exfiltration attempts, and policy exception records. Covers all data channels: storage, email, collaboration, and endpoints.

name: Cloud Log Retention Matrix
description: Matrix of all cloud log sources with retention periods, storage locations, immutability settings, and regulatory requirements. Maps each log type to applicable compliance obligations.
